pi_items.source: Verified against setup_equest.ps1 which configures ProjPath='C:\Users\Docker\Documents\eQUEST 3-65 Projects\'
Verified against task description: 6:00 AM to 10:00 PM (Hours 7-22). Hour 1=Midnight-1AM, so Hours 7-22 = indices 6-21. Profile correctly has 16 consecutive 1s with 0s for all other hours
Verified against task description: 7:00 AM to 1:00 PM (Hours 8-14). Hour 1=Midnight-1AM, so Hours 8-14 = indices 7-13. Profile correctly has 7 consecutive 1s with 0s for all other hours
Verified against task description which explicitly states 'Run the full annual DOE-2.2 energy simulation'

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real, detailed building energy model (4StoreyBuilding.inp) with 3,258 lines containing 36 floors, 136 spaces, 20 HVAC systems, and 14 annual schedules for full-year 2013 simulation. Expected weekday fan schedule: 6 AM-10 PM (16 hours on, indices 6-21). Expected Saturday schedule: 7 AM-1 PM (7 hours on, indices 7-13). Both profiles are correctly defined in metadata. The project will be loaded from C:\Users\Docker\Documents\eQUEST 3-65 Projects\4StoreyBuilding\4StoreyBuilding.inp and requires execution of a DOE-2.2 energy simulation.
